steps.title: Connect claim and example
steps.content: The previous sentence says increased production quotas gave food-processing employees greater bargaining power. The underlined portion then shows that bargaining power in action: employees demanded better benefits, and employers agreed because they needed to fulfill wartime contracts.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: Choice B wrongly makes this a broad economic trend. Choice C calls it an exception, but it supports the labor activism narrative. Choice D focuses on worker identities, while the underlined portion focuses on labor relations and bargaining. The answer is A.
